targets.notes: Annually thereafter, achieve and maintain 100% renewable electricity; procure renewable energy from sources that create additionality when available and commercially reasonable.
targets.title: Scope 1 and 2: 100% renewable electricity by FY25

targets.boundary: manufacturing suppliers comprising at least 67% of Scope 3 Category 1 (Purchased Goods and Services) GHG emissions
targets.notes: With the goal of effecting supplier adoption of science-based targets aligned with limiting temperature rise to 1.5 degrees Celsius.
targets.title: Scope 3: Engage suppliers covering at least 67% of Category 1 by FY26
